reviews.comment:
Tiene dos ingresos y son poco agiles, el personal no colabora para que mejore. Es la única estación ypf de santa clara lamentablemente.

(Translated by Google)
It has two entrances and is slow to respond; the staff isn't helping to improve it. Unfortunately, it's the only YPF station in Santa Clara.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCXzZPWmhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar en verano quedo chico, no cargan puntos ypf porque "tienen caido el servicio" si vas y justo esta el camion de combustible, a esperar, cierran todo incluso para inflar las ruedas, no tiene sentido.

(Translated by Google)
The place is small in the summer, they don't charge YPF points because "their service is down" if you go and the fuel truck is there, wait, they close everything even to inflate the tires, it doesn't make sense.
